name: plugin-frontmatter-validator
description: Claude Code plugin SKILL.md frontmatter validator. Verifies required-field presence and the byte-exact `name == basename` invariant against the claude-code-plugin stack file. Provider is shell-native (bash + awk + jq); no external binary beyond POSIX utilities. Five-file layout (adapter.json + probe.sh + run.sh + normalize.sh + test/contract.bats).
